title: Principal Instructional Designer at CL Educate

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at CL Educate
jsonLd.description:
CL Educate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CL Educate:
CL Educate is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CL Educate!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
